data.body: FORCE_CLOSE: close gate(s) bypassed by user approval — no completion/signature attestation was signed. Reason: "Operational provisioning (no repo code change). All ACs proven live and recorded on the ticket: identity 594c exists (AC1), registered pubkey == materialized SSM private key (AC2, ssh-keygen -y match), git email matches (AC3), fresh probe ticket 4c55 signed+verified (AC4), key 0600 outside repo + runbook (AC5, operator-attested comment). The completion verifier cannot confirm runtime env provisioning (private key file, live signing) from a committed code tree, so closing on the recorded evidence.".
